verse_text: For whoever is ashamed of Me and My words, of him the Son of Man will be ashamed when He comes in His own glory, and in His Father's, and of the holy angels.

pericope.title: Peter's Confession: Jesus is the Christ

links.context: While any Christian may be persecuted ([[JOH.15:20]]; see [[MAT.5:11]], [[MAT.5:12]] and note), we reject feelings of fear or timidity. We do not "quench the Spirit" ([[1TH.5:19]]), but act with power and courage (2:12; see [[MAT.10:33]]; [[LUK.9:26]]).
St. Paul is not ashamed of the gospel of Christ, thus setting an example for all believers (see [[LUK.9:26]]).
